headline: Micron Stock, In Major Bull Run With 177% Growth Rate, Holds Strong Ahead Of Quarterly Results
summary: Micron stock, a big winner in 2025, is still in major growth mode as a provider of memory of storage chips for training AI models.

headline: Exploring Analyst Estimates for Jabil (JBL) Q2 Earnings, Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Jabil (JBL), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended February 2026.

headline: HyperLight and UMC Collaborate with Jabil to Bring TFLN Photonics to Data-Center Scale Deployment
summary: CAMBRIDGE, Mass. & HSINCHU, Taiwan, March 13, 2026--HyperLight Corporation ("HyperLight"), United Microelectronics Corporation (NYSE: UMC; TWSE: 2303)("UMC"), and Wavetek Microelectronics Corporation ("Wavetek"), a wholly owned subsidiary of UMC, today announced a collaboration with Jabil Inc. ("Jabil"), to accelerate the deployment of thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN) photonics into hyperscale AI data center interconnects.
